books.title: Invaders from the Infinite
books.author: John W. Campbell
books.summary: Three scientists join with an alien race to defeat an attacking force.

books.title: The House Without a Key
books.author: Earl Derr Biggers
books.summary: Upon arriving in Honolulu, a member of a prominent Boston family is asked to aid in the investigation of his relative’s murder.

books.title: The Autobiography of Ma-Ka-Tai-Me-She-Kia-Kiak, or Black Hawk
books.author: Black Hawk
books.summary: The autobiography of Black Hawk, the famous leader of the Native American Sauk tribe and central figure in the Black Hawk War of 1832.

books.title: Tombstone
books.author: Walter Noble Burns
books.summary: An embellished retelling of the town of Tombstone, Arizona, during its heyday in the late 19th century, featuring famous heroes and outlaws of the American Old West.

books.title: The Magic City
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: A young boy, upset by his older sister’s recent marriage, builds an imaginary city out of blocks and household items and then finds himself living inside it.

books.title: Our American Cousin
books.author: Tom Taylor
books.summary: A rough American from a distant branch of the Trenchard family returns to England and quickly becomes embroiled in the family’s affairs.

books.title: The Hairy Ape
books.author: Eugene O’Neill
books.summary: An expressionist play following a brutish stoker’s dehumanization as he descends from being a leader of his fellow workers to a literal ape.

books.title: Beyond Thirty
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: A young naval officer finds himself in a forbidden part of the world after storms waylay his ship.

books.title: The Bellamy Trial
books.author: Frances Noyes Hart
books.summary: A man and a woman are on trial for the murder of his wife, her friend.

books.title: Melmoth the Wanderer
books.author: Charles Robert Maturin
books.summary: A set of overlapping tales tell the story of a mysterious, malevolent, ageless stranger.

books.title: Red Dusk and the Morrow
books.author: Paul Dukes
books.summary: A newly-minted secret agent is sent to pick up the pieces of Britain’s spy networks after they are shattered by the Red Terror.

books.title: The Cheyne Mystery
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: A man is drugged and then burgled for something he doesn’t know he has.

books.title: Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass
books.author: Frederick Douglass
books.summary: Frederick Douglass describes his youth as a slave in Maryland and his desire to be a free man.

books.title: Human Nature and Conduct
books.author: John Dewey
books.summary: Dewey applies the theory of pragmatism to morality, reason, and society.

books.title: Gitanjali
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.summary: Prose poems of offering translated by the author from the original Bengali.

books.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
books.author: E. M. Forster
books.summary: After an English widow on holiday impetuously falls in love with a handsome young Tuscan, her panicked in-laws send a rescue party.

books.title: At the Earth’s Core
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: Two explorers burrow deep into the planet’s crust and emerge in a savage land inside a hollow Earth, where they have many adventures.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Ernest Hemingway
books.summary: A collection of Ernest Hemingway’s short stories and novellas.

books.title: Paradise Lost
books.author: John Milton
books.summary: A dramatic imagining in blank verse of the rebellion of Satan against God, Satan’s overthrow, and the Fall of Man.

books.title: Through the Brazilian Wilderness
books.author: Theodore Roosevelt
books.summary: Theodore Roosevelt’s autobiographical account of his expedition into the uncharted depths of the Brazilian rainforest.
